所有程序包|所有类和接口|序列化表格

R

Random() - 类中的方法 AccountType.Account
to create a random string base on a random number as an account's file name.
readArrayFromFile(String) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountBillInfo
Reads a three-dimensional array from a file.
readBalance(String) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountModifier
Read balance double from specific amount of money and send back as a double array.
readInfo(String, int) - 类中的方法 login.AccountInfoReader
Reads specific user information from a file.
readLogsForMonth(int, int, String) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountBillInfo
Reads log entries for a specific month from a file.
reduceBalance(String, double, Account) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountModifier
Reduce balance and modified file content.
refreshAccountFiles() - 类中的方法 Page.homeGUI
Refreshes the list of account files from the storage when account details change, such as after creating a new account or updating an existing one.
refreshAccountFiles() - 类中的方法 Page.homePageForKid
Refreshes the list of account files from the storage when account details change, such as after creating a new account or updating an existing one.
refreshAccountFiles() - 类中的方法 Page.homePageForParent
Refreshes the list of account files from the storage when account details change, such as after creating a new account or updating an existing one.
reinforceTermFinished() - 类中的方法 AccountType.SavingAccount
Forces the termination of the deposit term without adding any accrued interest.
